specs.title: authenticate and save state

error.message:
Error: page.goto: net::ERR_TOO_MANY_REDIRECTS at http://localhost:4000/events
Call log:
[2m  - navigating to "http://localhost:4000/events", waiting until "domcontentloaded"[22m
error.stack:
Error: page.goto: net::ERR_TOO_MANY_REDIRECTS at http://localhost:4000/events
Call log:
[2m  - navigating to "http://localhost:4000/events", waiting until "domcontentloaded"[22m

    at /Users/shaileshsingh/G_I_C_A/e2e/auth/global-setup.ts:57:14
error.snippet:
55 |   // The dashboard currently triggers unsupported transaction code paths in the
  56 |   // neon-http driver and is not needed to persist an authenticated session.
> 57 |   await page.goto('/events', { waitUntil: 'domcontentloaded' });
     |              ^
  58 |   await page.waitForURL('**/events**', { timeout: 15000 });
  59 |
  60 |   // Save authenticated session for reuse in all tests

errors.message:
Error: page.goto: net::ERR_TOO_MANY_REDIRECTS at http://localhost:4000/events
Call log:
[2m  - navigating to "http://localhost:4000/events", waiting until "domcontentloaded"[22m


  55 |   // The dashboard currently triggers unsupported transaction code paths in the
  56 |   // neon-http driver and is not needed to persist an authenticated session.
> 57 |   await page.goto('/events', { waitUntil: 'domcontentloaded' });
     |              ^
  58 |   await page.waitForURL('**/events**', { timeout: 15000 });
  59 |
  60 |   // Save authenticated session for reuse in all tests
    at /Users/shaileshsingh/G_I_C_A/e2e/auth/global-setup.ts:57:14

CE1: No duplicate provider calls for the same trigger
CE6: Upstream mutation is NOT rolled back when downstream send fails
CE7: Stale payload not used — snapshot at emit time is sent
CE8: Red flag is upserted, not duplicated
CE9 + CE19: Handler never writes to another event
CE10: Malformed payload is dead-lettered, not retried
CE12: Keys include channel suffix; email success does not block whatsapp retry
CE15: Final failure surfaces to ops (log.failed + Sentry + red flag)
CE17: In-flight cascade completes even after event archival
CE18: One notification_log row per (key); retries UPDATE not INSERT
